subcodes.first_line: O thou enraptured leaf! With every breath render a hundred thousand thanks at the Threshold of Oneness for that family and all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه در هر نفسی صد هزار شکر بدرگاه احدیت نما که آن خانواده و جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @thankfulness; gratitude
